description:
Sort contigs by Domain_Search score

Matches the output ordering used by domain_search.py when --max_hits is set. This is primarily intended for post-processing domain_search output written without --max_hits, where the temporary hit_best_score annotation is not preserved in the written GenBank file.

If --domains is supplied, sorting switches to the best matching Domainator annotation score for the requested domain names. If --databases is also supplied, only matching Domainator annotations from those databases are considered.

parameters.name: Max Hits
parameters.help: Maximum number of contigs to return. Prioritized by the best selected annotation score. [default: return all contigs]

parameters.name: Domains
parameters.help: If supplied, sort by the best Domainator annotation score from domains with these names instead of Domain_Search annotation scores.

parameters.name: Databases
parameters.help: When used with --domains, only consider Domainator annotations from these databases.
